goals.title: 사용자 요청: 분석 결과 페이지의 UI 개편과 GMS_KEY 기반 LLM 연결 작업이 정상 완료됐는지 확인한다. 완료되지 않...
goals.objective: 사용자 요청: 분석 결과 페이지의 UI 개편과 GMS_KEY 기반 LLM 연결 작업이 정상 완료됐는지 확인한다. 완료되지 않았다면 관련 Codex 세션 정보와 로컬 변경을 확인해 실제 동작까지 완성하고, 브라우저/HTTP 증거로 검증한다.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser Playwright: open http://127.0.0.1:5175/analyze/99 with mocked analysis API, verify category/subtopic result UI, check EtherCAT, reload, and assert 60 percent progress persists.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: browser-qa.json: 40% initial, EtherCAT check -> 60%, reload persists checked/60%; screenshots result-desktop-initial.png, result-desktop-checked-reload.png, result-mobile.png | cleanup: killed QA Vite pid 11660; 5175 no LISTENING

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP curl: start llm_server on 127.0.0.1:18081 with LLM_INTERNAL_TOKEN and parent .env GMS_KEY, POST live-gms-payload.json to /llm/roadmap, require HTTP 200, non-mock JSON, timeline_data/subtopics/question, and no Authorization/Bearer leak.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: live-gms-checks-rerun.json: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, is_mock false, competency_gap true, timeline_data true, subtopic question true, no replacement char, no Authorization/Bearer leak | cleanup: uvicorn 18081 stopped; only TIME_WAIT remains

successCriteria.scenario: Regression commands in worktree: llm_server pytest, backend pytest, frontend build, full Playwright E2E on isolated 5174 port.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Command outputs: 13 LLM tests passed, 38 backend tests passed, Vite build passed, 5 E2E passed.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: llm_server pytest: 13 passed; backend pytest: 38 passed; frontend build passed; frontend E2E isolated 5174: 5 passed | cleanup: Playwright webServer exited; 5174 no LISTENING, only TIME_WAIT

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/verify-analysis-gms-20260623/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/verify-analysis-gms-20260623/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
